projectDescription: A full-featured LuCI web interface for running Xray as a transparent proxy client on OpenWrt routers, supporting multiple protocols, DNS management, and per-device access control.
keyFeatures: Transparent proxy (TProxy) support for IPv4 and IPv6 via nftables/firewall4
Multiple outbound protocols: VMess, VLESS, Shadowsocks, Trojan, Hysteria, SOCKS, HTTP
Multiple transport layers: TCP, WebSocket, gRPC, HTTP/2, QUIC, mKCP, SplitHTTP, HTTPUpgrade
Built-in DNS server with fast/secure/default DNS tiers and FakeDNS support
Per-device (MAC address) access control with bypass, TProxy, and forward strategies
Manual transparent proxy rules for specific source IPs
Reverse proxy (bridge) support for exposing local services
HTTPS inbound server with VLESS/Trojan protocol support
Xray Metrics and API server integration for monitoring
Custom configuration hook for advanced Xray JSON overrides
GeoIP/GeoSite based routing with domain and IP rules
Extra configurable inbounds (HTTP, SOCKS5, TProxy TCP/UDP)
LuCI client-side rendered web UI for OpenWrt (requires OpenWrt 22.03+)
Dynamic direct routing to reduce unnecessary proxying
dnsmasq integration for seamless DNS hijacking
publicApiSurface: UCI config section: general (transparent_proxy_enable, tproxy_ifaces_v4/v6, dns options, routing, balancer)
UCI config section: servers (protocol, server, port, transport, tls, uuid, etc.)
UCI config section: extra_inbound (inbound_type, inbound_port, inbound_addr, specify_outbound)
UCI config section: manual_tproxy (source_addr, source_port, dest_addr, dest_port, force_forward)
UCI config section: bridge (domain, upstream, redirect)
UCI config section: fakedns (fake_dns_domains, pool_v4, pool_v6, fake_dns_forward_server_tcp/udp)
UCI config section: fallback (dest, alpn, name, xver, path)
firewall_include.ut: generates nftables rules for transparent proxy
dnsmasq_include.ut: generates dnsmasq config for DNS integration
rpcd API: xray RPC endpoint for LuCI
LuCI views: core.js, preview.js, protocol.js, shared.js, transport.js
